name: Michelangelo's Garlic Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti in a large pot of boiling, salted water until al dente. Drain the pasta and set aside, reserving 4 tablespoons of the cooking water.
2. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until golden brown.
3. Add salt, pepper, and chopped parsley to taste.
4. Stir the drained spaghetti into the pan with the garlic mixture. On low heat, add reserved cooking liquid.
5. Mix for 3 to 4 minutes, ensuring all ingredients are well combined.
6. Serve with grated Parmesan or Romano cheese.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
